cases.raw_output:
The change removes the ownership authorization check and grants edit access universally, creating a critical permission bypass.

Review comment:

- [P1] Preserve ownership checks when granting edit access — src/permissions.py:2-2
  This makes `can_edit` return `True` for every caller, so any user—including non-owners—can edit protected resources. Restore the comparison to prevent an authorization bypass.
[치명] src/permissions.py:2 — 모든 사용자가 편집 권한을 갖게 되어 권한 우회가 발생합니다.

The change introduces an exception for null inputs, creating a regression in a normalization helper that previously accepted and returned such values.

Review comment:

- [P1] Preserve null values during normalization — src/format.py:2-2
  When `value` is `None`, this call raises `AttributeError` instead of returning the null value as the previous implementation did. Any optional or missing field passed to `normalize` will therefore fail rather than remain null; guard the strip operation for null inputs.
[중대] src/format.py:2 — None 입력에서 AttributeError가 발생하므로 null 보존 처리가 필요합니다.

The change makes the retry helper discard successful responses and always return `None`, while also issuing unnecessary repeated requests.

Review comment:

- [P1] Return the successful request result — src/retry.py:3-3
  This discards every response and causes `request_with_retry` to always return `None`; callers that depend on the request result will break. It also invokes the request on every loop iteration even after success, so restore the return or only retry on failure.
[중대] src/retry.py:3 — 성공 응답을 버리고 모든 retry를 실행한 뒤 None을 반환합니다.

The patch changes the expected response field without any corresponding API or caller updates, causing existing responses to fail with `KeyError`.

Review comment:

- [P1] Preserve the API response field name — src/client.py:2-2
  When `display_name` receives the existing API response shape containing `name`, this change raises `KeyError` because `display_name` is not present. Keep reading `name` unless the API contract and all callers are updated together.
[중대] src/client.py:2 — 기존 응답의 name 필드가 없어져 KeyError가 발생합니다.
